title: Clone Drone in the Danger Zone

notes: Manually set the best region in the settings as it can't find it itself
title: Clone Drone in the Danger Zone

notes: I have a report below, gold as well.  The Dev changed the game for Proton, so if you want MP to work, you need to go into options and change the MP region off auto (which Wine can't handle) to one of the regions.  After that, MP is perfect.  Enjoy!  It's a great game.
